creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
I can't install net/avahi-app because it fails:
..........
g-ir-scanner: warning: Option --strip-prefix has been deprecated;
see --identifier-prefix and --symbol-prefix.
Shared object "libpcre.so.0" not found, required by "libavahi-glib.so.1"Command '['/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.29/avahi-gobject/tmp-introspectGUPvHk/Avahi-0.6', '--introspect-dump=/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.29/avahi-gobject/tmp-introspectGUPvHk/types.txt,/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.29/avahi-gobject/tmp-introspectGUPvHk/dump.xml']' returned non-zero exit status 1
gmake[3]: *** [Avahi-0.6.gir] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.29/avahi-gobject'
gmake[2]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.29/avahi-gobject'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.29'

*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/avahi-app.

===>>> make failed for net/avahi-app
===>>> Aborting update

Terminated

How-To-Repeat: Try to install net/avahi-app
